metadata.description: Training prompts for T2I-RL compositional generation

color_binding: a red apple and a green pear on a table
a blue car parked next to a yellow taxi
a white cat sitting beside a black dog
a purple flower in a pink vase
a red ball and a blue cube on the floor
an orange butterfly on a green leaf
a brown horse standing near a white fence

a pink dress hanging next to a blue dress
a red strawberry and a yellow lemon on a plate
a grey elephant beside a brown monkey
a cyan teapot and a magenta cup
a violet butterfly and an orange flower
a turquoise ocean with a golden sunset
a red tomato and a green cucumber in a bowl
a blue whale swimming near a yellow submarine

a ball under the table
a bird flying above the tree
a dog standing behind a fence
a book placed on a shelf
a lamp next to a bed
a car parked in front of a house
a plane flying over the mountains
a fish swimming beneath the boat
a child standing between two adults
a flower growing beside a rock

a cup placed on top of a saucer
a painting hanging above the fireplace
a cat hiding under the bed
a sun setting behind the buildings
a squirrel climbing up a tree

a kite flying high in the sky
a bench positioned under a tree

two cats playing together

six colorful balloons floating
two dogs and one cat in a yard

four children playing in a park
two butterflies on a flower

four cups arranged in a row
three horses running in a field
two pandas eating bamboo
one sun and three clouds
four chairs around a table
two shoes next to a door
three ducks swimming in a pond
attribute_binding: a large red apple and a small green apple
a tall building next to a short house
a fluffy white cat and a sleek black cat
an old wooden chair and a new metal chair
a bright yellow sun and dark grey clouds
a round table with a square tablecloth
a shiny golden trophy and a matte silver medal
a thick red book and a thin blue book
a smooth stone and a rough piece of bark
a transparent glass vase with colorful flowers
a heavy iron ball and a light plastic ball
a straight road leading to a curved bridge
a wide river flowing under a narrow bridge
a soft plush toy and a hard wooden toy
a striped orange tiger and a spotted brown leopard
a polka-dotted dress and a plain white shirt
a curly-haired dog and a straight-haired cat
a wrinkled old elephant and a smooth young dolphin
a sparkling diamond and a dull grey rock
a fuzzy peach and a smooth nectarine

two cats playing with a yellow ball in front of a cozy fireplace
a white dog sleeping under a large oak tree in a sunny garden
three children building a sandcastle on a beach with blue ocean waves
a chef cooking in a kitchen with pots on a stove and vegetables on the counter
a cyclist riding a red bike on a path through a green forest
an artist painting a landscape with mountains and a river on canvas
a family having a picnic with a red blanket under cherry blossom trees
a bookshelf filled with colorful books next to a reading chair with a lamp
a farmer feeding chickens in a barnyard with a red barn in the background
a scientist working in a laboratory with beakers and test tubes
a musician playing a guitar on a stage with colorful spotlights
a baker decorating a white cake with pink frosting in a bakery
astronauts floating in a space station with Earth visible through the window
a teacher writing on a blackboard in a classroom with students at desks
a gardener planting flowers in a garden with a watering can nearby
a child flying a colorful kite in a park on a windy day
a boat sailing on a calm lake with mountains reflected in the water
a street market with vendors selling fruits and vegetables under colorful tents
a cozy living room with a fireplace, sofa, and a Christmas tree with ornaments
